title: ba`ah #1158
definition:
1) to seek out, swell, cause to swell, boil up, enquire
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to seek, enquire
        1a2) to cause to boil up
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be searched out
        1b2) to be swelling, bulging, swelling out
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to seek out, swell, cause to swell, boil up, enquire
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to seek, enquire
        1a2) to cause to boil up
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be searched out
        1b2) to be swelling, bulging, swelling out

    NASB:  to inquire, cause to swell or boil up
